expectations.evidence: No dedicated TurboSign config/client file exists. The turbosign.service.ts reads env vars directly in its constructor but there is no turbodocx.service.ts or turbodocx.module.ts config file
No file calls TurboSign.configure(). The service reads TURBODOCX_API_KEY and TURBODOCX_BASE_URL from process.env directly in the constructor without using the SDK's configure method
turbosign.controller.ts uses @Controller('turbosign'), @Post('send'), @Get('status/:id'); turbosign.service.ts uses @Injectable(); turbosign.module.ts uses @Module()
src/turbosign/turbosign.controller.ts exists as a NestJS controller with @Controller decorator
.env.example contains TURBODOCX_API_KEY and TURBODOCX_BASE_URL but does NOT contain TURBODOCX_SENDER_EMAIL. No .env file exists either.
No file contains 'Router()' or 'express.Router'. All routing uses NestJS @Controller and @Module patterns
All generated files use .ts extension (turbosign.controller.ts, turbosign.service.ts, turbosign.module.ts, etc.)
